Logistic Regression.calibrated_model:

                                 Pipeline(steps=[('impute',

                                ('categorical',

                                 ['cp', 'restecg', 'slope', 'ca', 'thal'])]), calibrated_estimator=<calibrator._IsotonicCalibrator object at 0x0000020DCD5CCBD0>)
